notes: Fun fact: Uganda is home to over half of the world's remaining mountain gorilla population. The source of the Nile is at Jinja, which also happens to be one of the best white-water rafting spots on Earth.
highlights: Liked: The warmth of the people is not exaggerated. Ugandans are genuinely welcoming, and the food portions are generous enough to feed a small army.
Did not like: Kampala traffic makes Nairobi look organized. The boda-bodas have no fear and no brakes.
